problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Combining Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
